caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is positioned in a recording studio, wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. He is seated in front of a professional silver microphone mounted on a boom arm, which features a label that reads " Rode NT1-A". The background consists of dark grey, horizontally ribbed acoustic foam panels. Throughout the sequence, the man speaks into the microphone, with his mouth open and facial expressions shifting as he communicates. In the early part of the clip, he gestures with his right hand, which appears blurred due to motion, before bringing it back down. His left arm, which features a tattoo, is partially visible. The camera remains static, focusing on his head and shoulders as he continues to speak.
